# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

This project expects respectful, constructive collaboration. Examples of behavior that helps the project include:

- Using welcoming and inclusive language.
- Respecting differing viewpoints and experience levels.
- Giving and receiving technical feedback constructively.
- Focusing disagreement on the code, configuration, or documentation.

Unacceptable behavior includes harassment, discriminatory language, personal attacks, publishing private information without permission, or sustained disruption of project discussions.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove comments, close issues or pull requests, or block contributors when behavior is harmful to the project or its participants.

Report conduct concerns to the maintainer privately. Reports will be reviewed with care and handled as confidentially as practical.
